# GitHub Actions for ASDM Core Assets

This directory contains GitHub Actions workflows for managing and automating ASDM Core Assets repository operations.

## Workflows

### asdm-workspace-init-pipeline.yml
This workflow initializes an ASDM workspace, setting up the necessary environment and configurations for development.

### asdm-workspace-execution.yml
This workflow handles the execution of tasks within an ASDM workspace, providing a standardized approach to running various development operations.

### asdm-context-space-sync.yml
This workflow synchronizes context registries, ensuring that context spaces are kept up-to-date with the latest changes and configurations.

## Usage

These workflows are automatically triggered based on repository events or can be manually dispatched through the GitHub Actions interface.
